title: improved logs
description: improves the model and texture of logs
body:
![improved logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/678975589c307a855fdc9314864d621a93dd642d_0.webp)

![sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **This resource pack replaces all textures and models of logs, as well as their trimmed versions and more**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7345723e7ea8ab35d42238889c9463bedaf33238.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png)  **what's he doing!**
- changes log models
- changes the texture of logs

![heh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png)  **Important note**

it is important to note that this resource pack does not support horizontal blocks, and it is recommended to use shaders for proper functioning

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0076017f3f98f4a5045a198ed3fb213ab7d60ca8.png)
